Home.title: Bilingual Next.js Starter Template
Home.subtitle: A complete starting point with Next.js, next-intl, Tailwind CSS, Zustand and shadcn/ui
Home.feature1Desc: Full Persian and English support with automatic text direction (RTL/LTR)
Home.feature2Desc: Navy and Pink themes with a smooth, animated switcher
Home.feature3Desc: Theme and locale preferences persisted to localStorage
Home.feature4Desc: Button, Card and Theme Switcher, ready to extend on top of Tailwind
Home.stackTitle: What was used in the design?
Home.stackDesc: Tailwind CSS for styling, shadcn/ui for base components, the Vazirmatn font for Persian text, and global CSS variables for colors

About.title: About this template
About.description: This project is a ready-to-use template for quickly starting Next.js projects. Its main goal is to provide a clean, optimized and reusable structure that follows the DRY principle.
About.archDesc: This project follows a Monolithic architecture, meaning all frontend parts live together in a single, unified project.

Footer.text: Built with Next.js as a sample project template
